processing_scope: Each cohort reconstructed, annotated and tested independently
statistical_testing: Patient pseudobulk, paired edgeR and Miller-IM GSEA performed separately within each cohort
replication_assessment: Cohort results compared only after independent testing
workflow: all-cell reconstruction -> pan-myeloid re-clustering -> marker and cluster-DEG review -> patient raw-count pseudobulk -> paired edgeR -> prespecified Miller-IM program GSEA
